payload.name: Rocket Lab USA, Inc.
payload.narrative:
Rocket Lab USA (RKLB) is an end-to-end space company that designs, manufactures, and launches orbital rockets — primarily the small-lift Electron vehicle and the HASTE suborbital/hypersonic test platform — while also building spacecraft and satellite components through its Space Systems division. The company is developing the medium-lift Neutron rocket (debut targeted for late 2026), which would significantly expand its addressable market into commercial constellation launches, national security missions, and potentially point-to-point cargo delivery. RKLB sits on the watchlist as the most operationally proven pure-play in public space infrastructure, with a growing $2.2 billion backlog, over 75 Electron missions flown, and a clear near-term catalyst in Neutron's inaugural flight — a milestone that would determine whether Rocket Lab transitions from a niche small-launch provider to a full-spectrum competitor against incumbents like SpaceX.

All content is for educational and research purposes only. WATCHLIST_ONLY — no positions, no trade execution.
